rows.label: qev056103_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Are you an Earthling? Ah...
On'otonam asked you to come...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056103_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm sorry... ...You came all this way,
but... my Ovah is already... fading...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hehe... but because of this, for
the very first time... I've slipped
out of the Ovah's shackles...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056103_MSG0004
rows.name:
And I might... finally be
able to grasp... freedom...[ST:wait ]
